subcodes.first_line: O Amin! Upon thee be the glory of God, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise. Thy letter, which thou didst dispatch from that land, hath been received in Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امین علیک بهاء الله العلیم الحکیم نامه ات که از ارض تا ارسال نمودی بساحت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @business; financial; property matters, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @love and unity
